name: Sea Urchin and Coffee
steps: Using a pair of open the urchin from the bottom in a circular direction.
Clean in water and remove the urchin tongues into water to rinse them.
Remove the tongues and store in container on grease proof paper.
Mix all the ingredients together in cold.
Fill each ramekin with 30g of mix and place in gastro.
Clingfilm the gastro and steam at 93C for 12 minutes until just set.
Allow to cool in the tray the store in the fridge.
Keep for no more that 2 days.
In service place in the oven at 64C for 10 minutes.
Once warm place 3 tongues of urchin on top of the custard finish with lemon zest.
